title: Velvety Umami Russian Beef Wrap
description: A rich, hangover-cure dish featuring beef gravy and leaf-wrapped steaming, perfect for a cold Russian winter morning.
instructions: In a large pan, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium-high heat. Add beef strips and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Remove beef from the pan and set aside. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the pan, then add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms to the pan and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 4 minutes.
Add the beef broth and gravy mix to the pan, stirring to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the gravy thickens, about 2 minutes.
Return the beef to the pan and stir to combine with the gravy. Season with salt, black pepper, and dill.
Warm the tortilla wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.

To assemble the wraps, place a portion of the beef and gravy mixture onto the center of a tortilla, then top with chopped parsley. Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up to form a compact cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining filling and tortillas.
